description: Split every frame into small chunks and require the record sequence to remain stable.
Coalesce adjacent frames on the same stream and require the record sequence to remain stable.
Interleave stderr diagnostic frames with stdout payload frames without changing decoded output records.
Classify malformed or incomplete JSON as codec-owned recoverable error evidence.
Classify early source termination as terminal evidence without inventing protocol correlation in sources.
Classify stdin close or EPIPE as source-owned write failure evidence.
Classify a slow or hung response as wait/codec timeout evidence, not source polling.
Detect duplicate tool ids before durable ToolResult correlation can diverge.
Detect permission-gate stalls when a PermissionRequest has no matching PermissionResponse.
Classify late responses after disconnect as replay/correlation evidence outside sources.
Reject records that contain literal provider secret markers.
Replay around a committed output row and require no duplicate committed output identity.
